name: Sidney Lumet
abstract: Sidney Arthur Lumet ( loo-MET; June 25, 1924 – April 9, 2011) was an American film director. Lumet started his career in theatre before moving to directing television in 1950, and then directing films from 1957, where he gained a reputation for making realistic and gritty New York dramas that focused on the working class, tackled social …

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: I loved working with Sidney Lumet when I worked with him... I did Deathtrap with Sidney Lumet... The Verdict with Sidney Lumet in the 80s
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
